name: Walnut Cream Dessert with Chocolate Sauce
recipeInstructions:
-------------------------------CHOCOLATE SAUCE-------------------------------
4 tbsp Butter
1/2 cup Unsweetened cocoa
1/2 cup Sugar
1/2 cup Whipping cream
Line an 8-inch souffle dish with plastic wrap, letting the excess extend over the edge; set aside.
Combine yolks, 1/4 cup sugar, flour and arrowroot in a medium saucepan. Whisk in cream, milk and kirsch. Place over medium heat and whisk constantly until completely cooled.
Beat butter and remaining sugar together in a medium bowl until light and fluffy. Fold in walnuts and the cooled yolk mixture. Turn into mold. Cover and refrigerate 6 hours or overnight. Remove from refrigerator and unmold. Serve immediately with Chocolate Sauce.
For Chocolate Sauce: Melt butter in a medium saucepan over medium heat. Reduce heat and whisk in cocoa and sugar. Gradually add cream, stirring constantly until the mixture is smooth and heated through. Serve warm.
